scope.summary: Wire the desktop cloud-mode account management path to the hosted SaaS backend: start/poll hosted Zalo QR login, hydrate cloud accounts, remove accounts through the backend instead of the local store, and keep SaaS device tokens in the OS keychain.
goals: Allow a linked cloud device to start a hosted Zalo QR flow from the desktop login screen
Poll hosted QR status and hydrate the session store from backend accounts after success
Delete cloud accounts through the backend API when the session store is in cloud mode
Store cloud device tokens in the OS keychain and pass only a non-secret sentinel from the webview after verification
Preserve the local QR login and local logout path when cloud mode is not active
nonGoals: Claiming live phone QR scan/send/restart proof for cloud-zalo-session-host
Changing the backend hosted worker trust boundary recorded in ADR-0006
Moving Zalo credential plaintext or persisted SaaS bearer tokens into the webview

acceptance.description: Svelte/TypeScript check passes with the cloud QR account-management UI.
Frontend production build passes with the cloud QR account-management UI.
Tauri core tests pass with cloud account deletion command registered.
Tauri clippy is clean with warnings denied.
